narrative:
Highland Heights-02-B (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 886 registered voters, with 52.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.1%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.4 percentage points.
